question: Do I need a certain English level to join?
answer: No. We place every student with a free placement test first, so you start at the right level — from complete beginner to advanced.

question: What actually happens in a Free Talk session?
answer: You drop in any time between 6:30 and 10:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. Teaching assistants and international volunteers are there to chat using our 180+ conversation topics — stay 30 minutes or the whole evening.

question: Who are the international volunteers?
answer: They're native and fluent English speakers who join our community specifically to have real conversations with students — not to teach grammar.

question: How long until I notice a real difference?
answer: It depends on your starting point and how often you practice, but most students report a noticeable jump in speaking confidence within their first month of regular Free Talk sessions.

question: Is there a trial before I commit?
answer: Yes — every student can book a free trial class and a free placement test before deciding anything.

question: What happens after I submit the contact form?
answer: Our team will reach out, usually within one business day, to understand your goals and book your free trial class.
